_comment: Pre-configures the clickhouse proxy at container startup via the -config flag. Without this file, Toxiproxy starts with no proxies and the proxy would need to be created manually via the REST API (POST /proxies) before any traffic can flow. For the integration test (HungConnectionIT) this is required: the Spring datasource URL points at the proxy port (18123) before the context boots, so the proxy must exist the moment the container is healthy. For the manual smoke-test stack (docker-compose.toxiproxy.yml) this file is not used — the proxy is created explicitly with a curl call after docker compose up.
name: clickhouse
